message:
🐛 Fix ai-fix.yml token and improve auto-qa error messages (#1686)

- ai-fix.yml: Use CONSOLE_AUTO PAT (with fallback to GITHUB_TOKEN) for
  Copilot coding agent assignment. The built-in GITHUB_TOKEN lacks
  permission to assign bots, causing repeated "Forbidden" comments on
  every auto-QA issue.
- auto-qa.yml: Add diagnostic hints to Copilot assignment failures —
  distinguishes expired PAT (401) from permission issues (403).

Root cause: CONSOLE_AUTO PAT expired ~Feb 28 (set Jan 29 with 30-day
expiry). All auto-qa runs since Mar 2 failed with "Bad credentials".
Token has been rotated with 365-day expiry.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
